description_long: This object is a stylized, pixelated rifle rendered in a blocky, low-resolution style reminiscent of retro video games. The rifle features a long, rectangular barrel with a slightly raised section near the rear, suggesting a receiver or bolt area. The body is primarily a muted yellow-green color with black accents outlining the edges and forming the trigger guard, magazine, and other key components. The grip and stock are compact and angular, with the magazine protruding downward in front of the trigger. The overall design is simplified, lacking fine details such as screws or texturing, but the essential silhouette and functional parts of a rifle are clearly represented. The object appears solid and rigid, with no visible moving parts or attachments beyond the basic rifle form.
description: A blocky, pixel-art style rifle with a yellow-green body and black accents, featuring a long barrel, compact stock, and protruding magazine. The design is simple and angular, evoking retro video game aesthetics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the barrel, stock, grip, and magazine, with clear black outlines and yellow-green body.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow muzzle and the rectangular cross-section of the barrel, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side, with the magazine and grip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the back of the receiver, with the blocky structure and black accents visible.
